label: sandbox • writable combined mode: read host CSV, compute in VM, file_write result to host
query: The host workspace contains data/sales.csv. Read it with file_read, compute the total of the amount column in your sandbox, then write a file total.txt containing exactly that total to the workspace using file_write with the relative path total.txt.
notes: Writable combined mode end to end (allowHostFolderWrites=true): host reads stay on file_read, computation happens in the VM, and the result lands back in the HOST workspace via file_write with a relative path — the write is change-tracked host-side. sandbox_write_file is hidden in this mode, so any call to it is a schema hallucination. Total pinned: 1200+2500+3200 = 6900.
